feedback.text: I want to support the initiative on fairer digital services. Consumers need stronger rights in rem with regard to digital products with clearly defined deadlines for exapolation and/or maintenance, without digital locks that break a product without the possibility of further use without the need to upload to a company server which is not subsequently operational. No dark patterns for corporations restricting access to their platforms (Apple walled garden or Google’s plans to limit the so-called Side loading).
